subcodes.first_line: O adornment of the mystics! Many are the worshippers, and numberless the ascetics, yet few indeed are those who are truly conscious of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زین العارفین عابد بسیار و زاهد بیشمار و اما بعرفان الهی کم کسی هوشیار یکی
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @knowledge; recognition of God
